evals.prompt: Create a new agent-team called 'example' using cli
evals.expected_output: Valid agent-team created with correct configuration
assertions: Uses correct cli method for creating agent-teams

evals.prompt: List all agent-teams and show their configuration using cli
evals.expected_output: Complete listing of agent-teams with details
assertions: Uses correct cli command or method for listing
Response includes name and configuration fields

evals.prompt: Delete the agent-team named 'example' using cli
assertions: Uses correct cli method for deletion
Confirms removal or provides verification step
